---
title: "besoegsdag_3"
subtitle: "`besoegsdag_3`"
description: "besoegsdag_3"
---

<!--
NEVER EDIT MANUALLY. This documentation was auto-generated by `seedcase-flower`.
If you want to edit the content, please make changes to the `datapackage.json` file.
-->

- Path: `resources/besoegsdag_3/data.parquet`
- Primary key: (`event`)

| Name                               | Title                            | Type     | Description                                                                                                                                                             |
|------------------------------------|----------------------------------|----------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `event`                            | The unique name of the event     | string   | The unique name identifying the event when the form was filled in.                                                                                                      |
| `center`                           | Research center                  | string   | The research center where the data item was recorded.                                                                                                                   |
| `date_v3`                          | date_v3                          | date     | Date of visit. Visit 3.                                                                                                                                                 |
| `staff_initials_v3`                | staff_initials_v3                | string   | Initials of the study staff member responsible for conducting the visit. Visit 3.                                                                                       |
| `identified_name_cpr_v3`           | identified_name_cpr_v3           | string   | Indicates whether the participant has been identified by full name and personal identification number (CPR). Visit 3.                                                   |
| `relative_v3`                      | relative_v3                      | string   | Indicates whether a relative or accompanying person is present at the visit. Visit 3.                                                                                   |
| `relative_name_v3`                 | relative_name_v3                 | string   | The name of the relative attending the visit. Visit 3.                                                                                                                  |
| `fasting_status_v3`                | fasting_status_v3                | string   | Indicates if the participant has been fasting since 10 pm the night before. Visit 3.                                                                                    |
| `last_meal_time_v3`                | last_meal_time_v3                | datetime | Indicates the time of the participant's last meal before the visit. Visit 3.                                                                                            |
| `food_intake_nonfast_v3`           | food_intake_nonfast_v3           | string   | Indicates what food and when the participant has eaten it, if the participant has not been fasting from 10 pm the day before the visit. Visit 3.                        |
| `alcohol_v3`                       | alcohol_v3                       | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided alcohol the past 24 hours. Visit 3.                                                                                            |
| `alcohol_intake_v3`                | alcohol_intake_v3                | string   | Indicates how much alcohol the participants has had and when the past 24 hours. Visit 3.                                                                                |
| `caffeine_v3`                      | caffeine_v3                      | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided caffeinated beverages the past 24 hours. Visit 3.                                                                              |
| `caffeine_intake_v3`               | caffeine_intake_v3               | string   | Indicates how much caffeine the participants has had and when the past 24 hours. Visit 3.                                                                               |
| `no_exercise_24h_v3`               | no_exercise_24h_v3               | string   | Indicates if the participant did any intense activity or excercise the past 24 hours. Visit 3.                                                                          |
| `exercise_24h_v3`                  | exercise_24h_v3                  | string   | Indicates how much intense activity or exercise the participant did and when the past 24 hours. Visit 3.                                                                |
| `smoking_v3`                       | smoking_v3                       | string   | Indicates if the participant has avoided smpking since the night before. Visit 3.                                                                                       |
| `smoking_amount_v3`                | smoking_amount_v3                | string   | Indicates how much smoking the participant has done and when since last night. Visit 3.                                                                                 |
| `no_medication_before_v3`          | no_medication_before_v3          | string   | Indicates if the participant took medication the morning before the visit. Visit 3.                                                                                     |
| `medication_before_v3`             | medication_before_v3             | string   | Description of the medication the participant took the morning before the visit. Visit 3.                                                                               |
| `not_active_transportation_v3`     | not_active_transportation_v3     | string   | Indicates if the participant used motorized/not-active transportation to SDCC before the visit. Visit 3.                                                                |
| `transportation_v3`                | transportation_v3                | string   | Description of the active transportation before the visit. Visit 3.                                                                                                     |
| `bp_chosen_arm_v3`                 | bp_chosen_arm_v3                 | string   | Arm used for blood pressure measurements. Visit 3. Derived using the formula: [besg_2_arm_1][bp_chosen_arm_v2]                                                          |
| `finapres_arm_cuff_size_v3`        | finapres_arm_cuff_size_v3        | string   | Finapres measurement: Size of arm cuff (S, M or L) at visit 2. Visit 3. Derived using the formula: [besg_2_arm_1][finapres_arm_cuff_size_v2]                            |
| `finapres_finger_cuff_size_v3`     | finapres_finger_cuff_size_v3     | string   | Finapres measurement: Size of finger cuff (S, M or L) at visit 2. Visit 3. Derived using the formula: [besg_2_arm_1][finapres_finger_cuff_size_v2]                      |
| `finapres_minus20_v3`              | finapres_minus20_v3              | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 1, performed approximately 20 minutes prior to the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. visit 3 |
| `bloodsample_minus15_v3`           | bloodsample_minus15_v3           | string   | Record whether the participant completed bloodsample measurement 1, performed approximately 15 minutes prior to the intervention. Visit 3                               |
| `vas_minus10_v3`                   | vas_minus10_v3                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 1, performed approximately 10 minutes prior to the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 3.                  |
| `bloodsample_minus5_v3`            | bloodsample_minus5_v3            | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time -5. Visit 3.                                                                                                             |
| `timer_started_v3`                 | timer_started_v3                 | string   | Record whether the timer was started at the time of test drink consumption (defined as time 0). Visit 3.                                                                |
| `mmtt_shake_bar_v3`                | mmtt_shake_bar_v3                | string   | Record whether the participant completed both shake and bar. Visit 3.                                                                                                   |
| `shake_bar_time_min_v3`            | shake_bar_time_min_v3            | string   | The number of minutes it took the participant to consume the test shake and bar, if the total consumption time exceeded 10 minutes. Visit 3                             |
| `mmtt_shake_v3`                    | mmtt_shake_v3                    | string   | The amount of the shake the participant drank. Text field. Visit 3.                                                                                                     |
| `mmtt_bar_v3`                      | mmtt_bar_v3                      | string   | The amount of the bar the participant ate. Text field. Visit 3.                                                                                                         |
| `finapres_time15_v3`               | finapres_time15_v3               | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 2, performed approximately 15 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. visit 3.   |
| `bloodsample_time30_v3`            | bloodsample_time30_v3            | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 30. Visit 3.                                                                                                             |
| `vas_time30_v3`                    | vas_time30_v3                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 2, performed approximately 30 minutes into the intervention. Visit 3.                                                      |
| `finapres_time45_v3`               | finapres_time45_v3               | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 3, performed approximately 45 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 3.   |
| `bloodsample_time60_v3`            | bloodsample_time60_v3            | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 60. Visit 3.                                                                                                             |
| `vas_time60_v3`                    | vas_time60_v3                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 3, performed approximately 60 minutes into the intervention. Visit 3.                                                      |
| `finapres_time75_v3`               | finapres_time75_v3               | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 4, performed approximately 75 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 3.   |
| `bloodsample_time90_v3`            | bloodsample_time90_v3            | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 90. Visit 3.                                                                                                             |
| `vas_time90_v3`                    | vas_time90_v3                    | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 4, performed approximately 90 minutes into the intervention. Visit 3.                                                      |
| `finapres_time105_v3`              | finapres_time105_v3              | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 5, performed approximately 105 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 3.  |
| `bloodsample_time120_v3`           | bloodsample_time120_v3           | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 120. Visit 3.                                                                                                            |
| `vas_time120_v3`                   | vas_time120_v3                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 5, performed approximately 120 minutes into the intervention. Visit 3.                                                     |
| `finapres_time135_v3`              | finapres_time135_v3              | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 6, performed approximately 135 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. visit 3.  |
| `bloodsample_time180_v3`           | bloodsample_time180_v3           | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken at time 180. Visit 3.                                                                                                            |
| `vas_time180_v3`                   | vas_time180_v3                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 6, performed approximately 180 minutes into the intervention. Visit 3.                                                     |
| `finapres_time195_v3`              | finapres_time195_v3              | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 7, performed approximately 195 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 3.  |
| `bloodsample_time240_v3`           | bloodsample_time240_v3           | string   | Record whether a bloodsample was taken approximately 240 minutes into the intervention. Visit 3.                                                                        |
| `vas_time240_v3`                   | vas_time240_v3                   | string   | Record whether the participant completed VAS 7, performed approximately 240 minutes into the intervention. Visit 3.                                                     |
| `finapres_time255_v3`              | finapres_time255_v3              | string   | Record whether the participant completed Finapress measurement 8, performed approximately 255 minutes after the intervention.  Response options: 1=Yes, 2=No. Visit 3.  |
| `finapres_upload_ldrive_v3`        | finapres_upload_ldrive_v3        | string   | Indicates whetner or not the Finapres data is saved on the L-drive. Visit 3.                                                                                            |
| `food_v3`                          | food_v3                          | string   | Food delivered. Visit 3.                                                                                                                                                |
| `mmtt_blood_deviation_v3`          | mmtt_blood_deviation_v3          | string   | Deviations related to blood sampling procedure. Visit 3.                                                                                                                |
| `mmtt_blood_deviation_describe_v3` | mmtt_blood_deviation_describe_v3 | string   | Description of any deviations regarding blood samples during MMTT. Visit 3.                                                                                             |
| `finapres_deviation_v3`            | finapres_deviation_v3            | string   | Deviations related to finappres procedure. Visit 3.                                                                                                                     |
| `finapres_deviation_describe_v3`   | finapres_deviation_describe_v3   | string   | Description of any deviations regarding finapres during MMTT. Visit 3.                                                                                                  |
| `vas_deviation_v3`                 | vas_deviation_v3                 | string   | Deviations related to VAS procedure. Visit 3.                                                                                                                           |
| `vas_deviation_describe_v3`        | vas_deviation_describe_v3        | string   | Description of any deviations regarding VAS during MMTT. Visit 3.                                                                                                       |
| `other_deviations_v3`              | other_deviations_v3              | string   | Other deviations. Visit 3.                                                                                                                                              |
| `other_deviations_describe_v3`     | other_deviations_describe_v3     | string   | Description of any other deviations. Visit 3.                                                                                                                           |
| `comments_end_v3`                  | comments_end_v3                  | string   | Comment at the end of the visit. Visit 3.                                                                                                                               |

: Fields in the `besoegsdag_3` resource.
